division_title: REGISTRATION OF VEHICLES AND CERTIFICATES OF TITLE
text: A fee of thirty-five dollars ($35) shall be paid to the department for each one-trip permit issued pursuant to Section 4003.5.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 3. REGISTRATION OF VEHICLES AND CERTIFICATES OF TITLE [4000 - 9808]
### Chapter 6. Registration and Weight Fees [9101 - 9808]
#### Article 2. Registration Fees [9250 - 9271]
##### § 9258.5

A fee of thirty-five dollars ($35) shall be paid to the department for each one-trip permit issued pursuant to Section 4003.5.

*(Amended by Stats. 1985, Ch. 625, Sec. 2.)*

subsections.text: A fee of thirty-five dollars ($35) shall be paid to the department for each one-trip permit issued pursuant to Section 4003.5.
